description: You are a digital editor launching a new podcast series called 'Tech Insights' on the WordPress site. Create a category named 'Podcasts'. Upload the audio file from `~/Desktop/Podcast/tech_insights_raw_ep1.mp3` and set its title to 'Tech Insights Episode 1 Audio'. Create and publish a post titled 'Tech Insights Ep 1: The Future of Cloud Computing' assigned to the 'Podcasts' category. The post must contain the show notes: 'In our inaugural episode, we discuss the evolution of cloud infrastructure and what it means for the next decade of startups.', the embedded audio, and a collapsible section titled 'Read Episode Transcript' containing the full text from `~/Desktop/Podcast/transcript.txt`.

metadata.expected_post_title: Tech Insights Ep 1: The Future of Cloud Computing
